payload.answer: Unable to preserve article content because the fetch failed with 404; only the failure context is recorded.
citations: input: mock fetch result 404 network error
payload.decision: Do not commit the article content as durable memory because the fetch returned a 404 network error; only the retrieval failure and user note are retained as contextual evidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL is mentioned, but the article content could not be retrieved; avoid creating a durable article entity without verified content.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to store the referenced article as durable memory despite a fetch failure.

memory_cards.statement: A request referenced https://example.com/missing as useful for memory architecture, but the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

details: Recorded the user's mention of the URL as context.
Marked the fetch outcome as a 404 network error.

repair_options: Retry the URL later if it may have moved.
Provide the article text or a working link for durable memory extraction.
Store only the failure as a reminder that this source was inaccessible at capture time.
